name: Surry Hills
heroAlt: Compact kitchen and hidden-storage joinery reference relevant to Surry Hills homes
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Renovations Surry Hills | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Custom kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and apartment-friendly joinery for Surry Hills homes and city-fringe renovations.
intro: Surry Hills projects often need joinery that solves storage and function without overcrowding the space. We build kitchens, wardrobes, laundries and tailored cabinetry designed for compact homes and renovation-led layouts.
localContext: From apartments to terraces and city-fringe renovations, Surry Hills homes benefit from practical cabinetry, cleaner planning and material choices that feel calm rather than cluttered.
projectReferenceNote: We are using the nearby Darlinghurst fitout as the live city-fringe reference until a dedicated Surry Hills case study is added, because it shows the same kind of compact-space planning and concealed storage logic.
whyChoose: Joinery designed for compact city-fringe homes
Storage that works harder without visual clutter
Warm, tailored finishes instead of generic cabinetry
A straightforward process from brief to installation

faqs.question: Do you work on apartments and terraces in Surry Hills?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work on city-fringe homes where custom joinery can improve storage, layout and day-to-day function.

faqs.question: Can you quote from plans or site photos?
faqs.answer: Yes. Plans, reference images and a simple scope summary are enough for an initial review.

faqs.question: Do you only take on full renovations?
faqs.answer: No. Some projects are whole-home fitouts, while others focus on one key room or storage problem area.

faqs.question: Can the reference project be updated later?
faqs.answer: Yes. A dedicated Surry Hills case study can be linked later without rebuilding the suburb page.

ctaText: If you are planning a joinery or renovation project in Surry Hills, send through your plans or photos and we can help review the scope.
